description_of_loss: On 01/25/2026, a water leak originating from property owned or managed by Coastal Trucking Inc. at 600 N. Pine Island Road, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33324 caused extensive damage to our insured's property located at 3300 S. Figueroa Street, Los Angeles, CA 90007. The leak, which appears to have resulted from a burst pipe, went undetected for approximately approximately 24 hours, allowing water to infiltrate our insured's living room and kitchen.
